project_type: Python FastAPI backend for Contract Lifecycle Management System (CLMS) with RAG pipeline
build_system: pip with requirements.txt, no Makefile or Docker yet
verification_instructions: 1. Install requirements.txt. 2. Run ingest script to parse Excel into ChromaDB. 3. Run pytest. 4. Start FastAPI with uvicorn and test endpoints.
snapshot_or_generated_files: backend/data/chroma_db/ - generated by ingest script, not checked in
environment_constraints: Python 3.9 available. Internet access for pip install. LMStudio at localhost:1234 (may not be running in sandbox). ChromaDB runs in-process (persistent local storage).
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md. Greenfield project - follow user's specified directory structure exactly.
key_patterns: Excel structure: Sheet 'KHS Material Ketenagalistrikan' has columns [Pasal(A), section_name(B), clause_text(C), data/variables(D)]. Rows have Pasal identifiers like 'Pasal 1', section names, full legal text with [PLACEHOLDER] variables, and required data fields. Sheet 'Pemetaan Kontrak ' maps clause names to M/O/P/X status across contract types. Sheet 'Master Klausul' has generic clause templates.
directory_structure: Root: /projects/sandbox/PengembanganAI-CLMS. Backend will be at backend/ with structure: app/ (main.py, config.py, api/, models/, services/, rag/, utils/), data/ (templates/, chroma_db/), scripts/, tests/. The Excel source file is at repo root.
